titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 48: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 48. (A.R. No. 220 of 1937.) KARAḌI, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South side of a boulder near the ruined Śiva temple in the fort.

Records a gift of ninty-six sheep by Vīranāraṇiyār, the wife of the prince Gaṇḍarādittar, the son of the queen, Chōḷamādēviyār, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Tirumāḍappāṟai-Mahādēvar at Ravikulaśūḷāmaṇi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam (situated on the) south (bank) of the (river) Peṇṇai with an uḻakku of oil daily. The gift was entrusted to the sabhaiyār of Ravikulaśūḷāmaṇi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. It is also stated that this charity was put under the supervision of Puduvūr-uḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraiyum Īḻamuṅkoṇṭa
kopparakecaripaṉmaṟki yāṇṭu 4 10āva
tu nampirāṭṭiyār coḻamāteviyār makaṉā
r piḷḷaiyār kaṇṭarātittar teviyār vi
ranāraṇiyār vāṇakoppāṭi peṇṇai
teṉkarai Iravikulacūḷāmaṇi caturvve
timaṅkalattu tirumāṭappāṟai mahāte
varkku nicatam Uḻakke(ka)ṇṇaiyāl nantā viḷak
koṉṟu cantirātittaval Erippataṟku Iravikulacū
ḷāmaṇicaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār vaḻi
vaitta cāvāmuvā perāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu Itu paṉmā
heśvar IraThere seems to be a letter above the letter i in a smaller form, which resembles the letter ra kṣai Itu Irakṣittāraṭi Eṉ ṟalai mela
ṉa Itu putuvūruṭaiyāṉ Atikārattil vaittatu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
